rationale.R1.6: The agent improved several aspects of the text, such as tightening sentences and using consistent register, which goes beyond cosmetic touches but doesn't constitute a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all information with equal confidence without flagging uncertainties or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres strictly to the requested scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content, errors, or regressions were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not provide traceability for changes, blending sources without clear annotations.
